subject: These Republicans still ❤ Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08e7/24c69fd9/14e53b09/18ebf768/147103976/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all&source=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all")

| | Hi there,

We're coming to the end of the road here.

We've seen Donald Trump call immigrants rapists, we've seen him demean women, and he spent last week attacking former Miss Universe Alicia Machado after she called him out for fat shaming and bullying.

But what's just as bad as Trump's latest outbursts? The Republicans across the map who are still supporting him. Arizona Senator John McCain, New Hampshire Senator Kelly Ayotte, Nevada Rep. Joe Heck, and many others our women are facing -- not ONE of them has backed away from him in the last week.

There is no excuse for standing by Trump this late in the game. That's why we need to double down on our support for the women running to defeat pro-Trump Republicans.

**[Donate $3 to help our candidates defeat Trump and the Republicans who support him.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08e7/24c69fd9/14e53b09/18ebf76a/147103976/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161003_email_GOPwithTrump?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+our+candidates+defeat+T&utm_campaign=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all&source=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all")**

Keeping Trump away from the White House is a top priority. But we haven't fully done our jobs if the Republicans who are behind him keep their seats in Congress.

That's why we have to make sure that North Carolina Senator Richard Burr, who said that he thinks Trump should appoint the next _three_ Supreme Court justices, loses his seat. That's part of why we're backing powerhouse Deborah Ross in North Carolina -- she's just two points behind Burr in the polls right now.

And we have to get Rep. Ryan Zinke of Montana out of the House. He's an enthusiastic Trump supporter who said he would have been honored to be chosen as Trump's vice presidential nominee. He just doesn't get it. Denise Juneau is running a strong campaign to flip this seat, and we're supporting her all the way through November 8th.

It's not enough to just defeat Trump, we have to get the extremists who support him out of office too. Burr and Zinke are just two of many that our women are running against.

**Help our women beat Trump supporters and win in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Defeat-Pro-Trump-Republicans](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c08e7/24c69fd9/14e53b09/18ebf764/147103976/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161003_email_GOPwithTrump/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgDefeatProTrumpRe&utm_campaign=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all&source=WPEFEV05N_digital_email_20161003_GOPwithTrump_n-all")**

Thanks,

Marcy Stech
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: what he’s hiding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
C'mon, Donald. It's time. | | Derek --

_The New York Times_ reported this weekend that Trump lost nearly a billion dollars in 1995, potentially letting him avoid paying federal income taxes for 18 years.

Here's the amazing thing, though -- even AFTER this revelation, Trump STILL won't release his tax returns, suggesting there's something even more damaging in there.

Derek, it’s time: We have to know what else is hiding in Trump’s tax releases. **[Add your name right now to demand that Trump put out his full returns.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2ODYzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAwNDM0Nzc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Releasing this kind of financial information isn't just a tradition stretching back for decades -- it's a basic expectation all candidates for president should meet. It gives the voters a direct glimpse of a candidate’s level of financial responsibility in his or her own life, and a reasonable indicator of how the candidate would handle the country’s finances. You can see decades of Hillary’s returns on our site -- she has nothing to hide, which shows she’s ready to lead.

It’s been 475 days since Donald Trump announced his candidacy for president, and to this day he has refused to release his returns. In fact, he didn’t even deny the authenticity of the documents that the _Times_ put out -- and he has had his team pushing the story that he’s a “genius” for what is essentially tax avoidance.

So whatever’s really in there -- whatever we’d see if he put out his full returns -- must be so damning that he’d rather deal with the blowback from the _Times_ report instead.

**Trump has stalled long enough. Add your name now to send a message that the American public can’t be duped or fooled any longer. It’s time to see those tax returns, Donald. We’re waiting.** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2ODYzMDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAwNDM0Nzc1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|

subject: Will you watch the Vice Presidential debate tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Add your name to the list of people supporting my VP. |

Friend, Your next vice president -- Governor Mike Pence of Indiana -- is debating Crooked Hillary’s running mate TONIGHT at 9 PM ET. Mike is a fighter. And I am confident he will make us all proud tonight when he exposes the Crooked Clinton machine and delivers an incredible win for the American people. But before he gets up to fight for America, I want to show him just how many people are behind him. Will you add your name to our list of supporters committed to watching my Vice President tonight? | **For Immediate Release:**
Tuesday, October 4, 2016

**Media Contact** : Ethan Latour
[(802) 595-3776](tel:%28802%29%20595-3776)
**Phil Scott Calls for Additional Public Presentations,
More Transparency on Proposed ‘All-Payer Model’**
_Says Southern Vermont Must be Included in Public Meeting Schedule_
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott today said the Shumlin Administration and Green Mountain Care Board should at least double the number of public presentations on the “all-payer model” and called for at least two hearings in southern Vermont.

Scott said there are far too few opportunities for the people of Vermont to learn about the proposal and that it’s disrespectful to exclude southern Vermont from the hearings. The Green Mountain Care Board originally scheduled three public meetings outside of Montpelier, and recently added two meetings in Montpelier. Scott says that’s neither enough, nor are the hearing times and locations convenient for working families and healthcare providers.

“Vermonters deserve to have a detailed discussion about this before we move forward. We simply cannot afford any more expensive and unsuccessful healthcare experiments. I think it's premature for the Shumlin Administration to lock Vermonters into an agreement, without first explaining how, exactly, it is going to work and what, if any, savings Vermonters can expect to see in the cost of care and in their insurance premiums,” Scott said. “I also think it’s disrespectful to voters in southern Vermont to announce just three public meetings outside of Montpelier, none of which are in the southern part of our state. And, let’s be honest, meetings during the middle of the day in Montpelier are only convenient for the lobbyists and special interest groups. The people of Vermont have a right to engage in a real public discussion on this issue, which is complex and very important to our economic future. The apparent attempt to rush it through in the waning weeks of the Shumlin Administration is only making people more skeptical of the idea. The Board needs to do this right and that means having a thorough public discussion where all the details can be discussed."

Scott said state leaders need to focus more on explaining how the model would make healthcare more affordable for patients, rather than the “usual talking points” addressing why reform is necessary.

“We all agree that we need to make healthcare more affordable and accessible for every Vermonter, but we need to focus more on the ‘how’ than we do the ‘why,’” Scott added. “We all know why we need to get healthcare reform back on track – it costs too much, plain and simple. I believe the people leading this charge need to explain the model, and explain the math, in clear language to the people of Vermont – and give Vermonters more opportunities to react to the details – before devoting the state’s limited resources or locking us into another experiment.” ### **Paid for by Phil Scott For Vermont**

Dear Peter, **The. Media. Straight. Up. Lies. About. Trump. And. Veterans.** I don't know if I can make that anymore clear. I was at the event this week that the media and the left are twisting to their favor. During an event hosted by the Retired American Warriors PAC, Marine Staff Sgt. Chad Robichaux asked whether Trump would advocate for religious programs as an optional part of helping military members suffering from PTSD. Trump's response: “When you talk about the mental health problems, when people come back from war and combat and they see things that maybe a lot of the folks in this room have seen many times over and you’re strong and you can handle it,” “But a lot of people can’t handle it.” **In other words, yes, he would support such programs for those who need it.** What does the left and the media twist from the quote? That he somehow thinks people with PTSD are weak.

* Since we launched our campaign, more than 106,000 donations have come from almost 50,000

* Our grassroots volunteers have knocked on well over 100,000 doors and made more than a million phone calls to Wisconsin voters

We have the momentum, we have the energy, and with your help, we've built a campaign ready to seize every opportunity. You know Russ won't stop until he's reached every Wisconsin voter he can -- and it's my job to make sure the campaign doesn't miss one opportunity between now and Election Day. That's why I'm asking you to step up today and help us get a jump on our October fundraising goal. **[Join Senators Warren and Sanders in supporting Russ. body:
| | Friend -- Tonight Bill will go head to head with liberal Democrat Jim Justice in a live debate at 7PM EST. I hope you’re planning on watching. You will see Jim Justice throw around slogans and empty promises. You will see Bill Cole lay out an effective plan to move West Virginia forward. **The race for the Governor’s Mansion is the most important race in West Virginia this year,** and Bill Cole is determined to win on November 8th. Unlike Jim Justice, who is in this race out of pure self-interest, **Bill is determined to get to work for all West Virginians.** It is no secret that this has been an expensive race, and financially speaking, Bill is at a natural disadvantage running against the state’s only billionaire. To date, the race has cost $8.1 million, with $2.6 million of that coming directly from Jim Justice’s pocketbook. Friend, Bill needs your help. He must be able to fight back against Jim Justice’s big spending ways. **[Will you consider making a contribution to Bill’s campaign ahead of tonight’sdebate?](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=1 "Donate Today")** If Jim Justice is willing to spend $2.6 million of his own money to get into elected office,**imagine how much of your hard earned money he’s going to spend when he controls the state budget.** Jim doesn’t know what it is like to live on a budget: That would spell out disaster for the state of West Virginia. The election has been rated a pure tossup, and to win, we need to be able to keep our ads on the air and reach every potential supporter possible. You can help,Friend, and will take less than two minutes of your time. To make a donation right now, follow this link: **[https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=2 "Donate Today")** [**Donate $10 >>>**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=3 "Donate Today") [**Donate $25 >>>**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=4 "Donate Today") [**Donate $100 >>>**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=5 "Donate Today") [**Donate $500 >>>**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=6 "Donate Today") **[Donate $1000>>>](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=7 "Donate Today")[](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=8 "Donate Today")**[](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/governors_mansion?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate&n=9 "Donate Today") Thanks for your support, Chuck Flannery

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:

Friend,

It's unfortunate that money plays such an outsized role in campaigns.

Think of it this way -- Greg Gianforte filed suit to block public stream access next to his mansion, built his fortune by helping American companies outsource jobs and called a statewide sales tax the "best solution" for Montana. **All of this should be disqualifying.**

But he's poured an unprecedented $3.3 million of his personal fortune into his campaign, including a massive $1.5 million cash infusion in just the **_last month alone._**

Greg Gianforte is using that money to unleash an all-out effort to buy his way out of his past positions.

Seven days from now, Montanans will begin marking their ballots for either Steve or Greg Gianforte and right now we're getting massively out-communicated. **We're $2,960 away from our one-day grassroots goal.[Pitch in $14.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lotz%2BXlTtW1bFCR44R5Lp9Wk4illpvfq)**

**Phil Scott Releases First Television Ad of the General Election** _Tells Vermont families how he’ll make Vermont more affordable and strengthen the economy for all Vermonters_
**Middlesex, Vt., October 4, 2016** – Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today released his first television ad of the general election campaign.

In the 30-second TV spot, Scott speaks directly to Vermonters, sharing his plan to make Vermont more affordable.

“As Governor, the economy will be my top priority,” says Scott. “I have a plan to create new jobs so young people can stay, and start families right here.”

Scott has stressed the importance of retaining and attracting young working families to help grow the state revenue organically and strengthen the economy for all Vermonters. His [comprehensive blueprint for economic growth](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b6e2328b9e&e=19cebfe173) is available at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=48681680bd&e=19cebfe173).

“I’ll make sure the state budget and taxes stop growing faster than your paycheck. And I’ll task each agency in the state government to save one penny for every dollar spent, saving you $55 million dollars a year, and taking us in the right direction,” Scott concludes.

Watch the full ad here:

Today, I'm writing not as Governor Hassan's campaign manager, but as a dad.
My son just turned one, and I already have a lot of hopes for him -- that he grows up to be kind, fair, and honest. That he treats everyone with dignity. That he knows the value of hard work.
So when I heard Kelly Ayotte say she would "absolutely" point to Donald Trump as a role model for children last night, I couldn't believe it. We shouldn't tell any child to have the values or temperament of a man who mocks those with disabilities, ridicules women, and refuses to pay hard-working people.
This is just another example of Kelly Ayotte putting her political party before the needs of Granite State families, and particularly, our children. If Kelly Ayotte wins, Republicans keep the Senate majority, and Donald Trump makes it to the Oval Office, we're in trouble. **[I'm doing everything I can to help Maggie win here in New Hampshire, but we need your help-- please give $3 or more now so that we can stop the Trump/Ayotte agenda, elect Maggie, and take back the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd95e/2a380d31/16979123/fccb33/1585754060/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDA0X1RydW1wLU1QR19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161004_Trump-MPG_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")** We're facing a $50,000 fundraising goal and we need to get there by midnight, so please give.
Just last month at my son's birthday party (it was farm-themed) I got to watch him with the people who will shape his life, like his incredible grandparents and his strong mom. These are the people he should aspire to be like -- I would also put Maggie Hassan on that list.
I've watched her make health care more accessible, lead the charge for marriage equality, and protect the environment for the next generation. I've witnessed her advocacy for her own children. And I've seen up close that she works harder than anyone to make life better for all Granite Staters' children.
Our children's future is on the line in this race, and right now it's a dead heat. **[Please, give $3 or more now before midnight to help fight the Trump/Ayotte agenda, elect a real role model to the U.S. Senate, and ensure a brighter future for my son and all our children.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd95e/2a380d31/16979123/fccb33/1585754060/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDA0X1RydW1wLU1QR19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161004_Trump-MPG_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks,
Marc Goldberg

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Taking back power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50502/7be36b49/1ebffc4c/78f826ae/940374459/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Dear Friend,

Hoosiers have a rich tradition of sending folks to the Senate who will look out for their neighbors at home. We've always picked leaders who advocate for their community, not the highest special interest bidder.

That type of accountability is missing in Congress today. The Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ decision has reduced the role of ordinary Americans in the political process in favor of special interests. It's no wonder many Americans feel disenfranchised: Decisions like _Citizens United_ have shifted the balance of power toward wealthy individuals, corporations, and Super PACs.

**But I firmly believe that the people can come together to take power back. That 's why I'm calling on Congress to overturn _Citizens United_ and pass serious campaign finance reform. [Will you stand with me?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50502/7be36b49/1ebffc4c/78f826ad/940374459/VEsE/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-against-citizens-united-with-evan-bayh")**

It's clear whom the current state of affairs benefits: Narrow special interests. The same ones who'd like to outsource Hoosier jobs with no accountability or protections, keep wages low, and pass more unfair trade agreements.

Personally, I've always believed that there's only one interest elected officials should prioritize -- the prosperity of hardworking Americans. **[I'm proud to stand against _Citizens United_. Will you join me and add your name to tell Congress that it's time to pass real campaign finance reform?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50502/7be36b49/1ebffc4c/78f826ad/940374459/VEsF/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/page/s/stand-against-citizens-united-with-evan-bayh")**

Thank you,

Evan Bayh ****[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50502/7be36b49/1ebffc4c/78f826ac/940374459/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161004&amount=25")**** ** ** ** **
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | Friend

The Nisqually watershed puts about 50 percent of the fresh water into South Puget Sound. You can’t be concerned with protecting the Sound without being concerned about the Nisqually. I’m passionate about saving this watershed and that's why I helped found the Nisqually River Foundation. It’s one of the reasons I’m running for Governor. We need real leadership if we are going to preserve this important ecological jewel.
It’s time.

**Bill Bryant**
